   "source": [
    "# Coupling Analysis: Estimating Transfer Paths Between Channels\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/case_coupling_analysis.ipynb)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "baa435aa",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.003209,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:51:56.687650+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:51:56.684441+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-en"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "This case study promotes the legacy PEM injection tutorial into the public docs. The output is a **coupling function**: a frequency-dependent estimate of how witness-channel noise projects into the target channel.\n",
    "\n",
    "That estimate is powerful for diagnosis, but it still models a transfer path rather than proving the physical mechanism behind it."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "de08d431",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:51:56.712070Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:51:56.711773Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.607125Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.605155Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 10.904242,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.608063+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:51:56.703821+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from astropy import units as u\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.analysis import PercentileThreshold, SigmaThreshold, estimate_coupling\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.asd import from_pygwinc\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import from_asd\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries, TimeSeriesDict\n",
    "\n",
    "fs = 2048\n",
    "duration = 32\n",
    "t = np.linspace(0, duration, duration * fs, endpoint=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build background and injection states so the injected witness excess can be distinguished from the nominal detector background.\n",
    "asd_target = from_pygwinc(\"aLIGO\", fmin=3.0, fmax=fs / 2, df=1.0 / duration, quantity=\"strain\")\n",
    "asd_target.name = \"L0:CAL-DARM_STRAIN\"\n",
    "wit_name = \"L0:PEM-VOLT_GND\"\n",
    "wit_bkg = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1.0, len(t)), t0=0, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name)\n",
    "wit_inj = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1.0, len(t)), t0=duration, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name)\n",
    "wit_inj += TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 20, len(t)), t0=duration, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name).bandpass(20, 600)\n",
    "\n",
    "cf_true = 2e-23 * asd_target.unit * u.Hz**0.5 / wit_bkg.unit\n",
    "data_bkg = TimeSeriesDict({asd_target.name: from_asd(asd_target, duration, fs, t0=0).highpass(6).notch(8) + cf_true * wit_bkg, wit_bkg.name: wit_bkg})\n",
    "data_inj = TimeSeriesDict({asd_target.name: from_asd(asd_target, duration, fs, t0=duration).highpass(6).notch(8) + cf_true * wit_inj, wit_inj.name: wit_inj})\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "90c197d7",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.004643,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.615493+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.610850+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-en"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. Estimate the coupling function\n",
    "\n",
    "The coupling function compares target excess to witness excess. If the witness injection does not produce significant target excess, the result becomes an upper limit rather than a direct estimate."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "9c51d281",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.653495Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.652930Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.290623Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.289650Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 1.653279,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.291307+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:07.638028+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "result = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=2.0, witness=wit_name)\n",
    "\n",
    "result.plot_cf()\n",
    "plt.axhline(cf_true.value, color=\"red\", linestyle=\"--\", alpha=0.8, label=f\"True CF ({cf_true:.2e})\")\n",
    "plt.ylim(5e-24, 5e-22)\n",
    "plt.xlim(10, 1020)\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f0c3a6b6",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.013521,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.310712+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.297191+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-en"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. Compare threshold strategies\n",
    "\n",
    "Changing the threshold strategy changes how conservative the coupling estimate is. This matters when injection lines are intermittent or when the target channel barely rises above background."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "9947cfb8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.357772Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.357502Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T13:52:12.503122Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T13:52:12.501928Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 3.161211,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:12.503887+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T13:52:09.342676+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "strategy_sigma = SigmaThreshold(sigma=5.0)\n",
    "strategy_pct = PercentileThreshold(percentile=95, factor=2.0)\n",
    "\n",
    "result_sigma = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=1.0, threshold_witness=strategy_sigma)\n",
    "result_pct = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=1.0, threshold_witness=strategy_pct)\n",
    "\n",
    "result_sigma.plot_cf(label=\"SigmaThreshold\")\n",
    "result_pct.plot_cf(label=\"PercentileThreshold\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
